event: UFC Fight Night: Fiziev vs. Torres

items.fight_news: A spectacular lightweight main event features the elite striking of Rafael Fiziev going against the devastating finishing instincts of Manuel Torres in Baku.
The narrative focus is whether Torres can handle the massive step up in competition against one of the division's most technical Muay Thai practitioners.
Undefeated striking sensation Sharabutdin Magomedov faces the wildest challenge of his career against the explosive and unpredictable Michel Pereira.
This middleweight bout guarantees fireworks, with both men known for their incredibly unorthodox and fan-friendly stand-up styles.
Hometown favorite Nazim Sadykhov looks to put on a show for the Baku crowd against the dangerous Matheus Camilo.
Expect a high-paced striking battle as Sadykhov aims to climb the lightweight ranks with a definitive victory on home soil.
Rising flyweight contender Asu Almabayev puts his impressive grappling skills to the test against the ever-durable Charles Johnson.
It is a classic matchup of early wrestling pressure versus veteran conditioning and striking volume.
Ikram Aliskerov returns to action aiming to impose his sambo dominance against the heavy-handed Brazilian Brunno Ferreira.
The stakes are massive in the middleweight division, as one clean shot from Ferreira could completely alter Aliskerov's trajectory.
This middleweight clash remains a massive test for both Abusupiyan Magomedov and Michał Oleksiejczuk.
Fans can look forward to a gritty battle as Oleksiejczuk's forward-marching boxing meets Magomedov's well-rounded grappling.
Farman Hasanov makes his walk to the Octagon looking to secure a crucial welterweight victory against Eric Nolan.
This preliminary matchup serves as a vital proving ground for both fighters to advance in the weight class.
Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev will attempt to assert his dominance in the light heavyweight division against the powerful Julius Walker.
Walker enters as the underdog but possesses the power to abruptly shift the momentum of the fight.
The towering Nursulton Ruziboev brings his intimidating presence to the cage against the resilient Andrey Pulyaev.
Pulyaev will need to overcome significant physical disadvantages to pull off the upset.
Featherweight prospects collide as Kaan Ofli takes on Javier Reyes in a bout that promises high-paced action.
Both fighters are eager to break out and make a name for themselves in one of the most talent-rich divisions.
Promotional newcomer Theodor Berggren steps up to the plate to face Daniil Donchenko after an injury forced the original opponent out of the bout.
Berggren gets the opportunity of a lifetime to make an instant impact under the bright lights.
Bantamweight talent is on full display as Bekzat Almakhan squares off against the undefeated Jean Matsumoto.
The judges are unlikely to be needed given the finishing instincts of these two promising athletes.
Opening the card, Tahir Abdullayev looks to set the tone for the hometown fans against Jefferson Nascimento.
This bout will heavily dictate the energy of the arena for the rest of the night.
